info.title: Gridfox Public API
info.description: Gridfox Public API for managing runtime data, audit data, groups, permissions, users, and tables.

get.summary: Gets audits for the record with the given referenceFieldValue in the specified table and project.
Searches user groups based on the specified searchRequest.

200.description: The user groups that match the specified searchRequest.

get.summary: Get the permissions of a user for a project.
Gets the record with the given referenceFieldValue in the specified table and project.

put.summary: Updates the record with the given referenceFieldValue in the specified table, based on the specified model.

delete.summary: Deletes the record with the given referenceFieldValue from the specified table.

post.summary: Creates a record in the specified table based on the specified model.

get.summary: Searches for record in the specified table based on the specified search parameters.

post.summary:
Updates the record with the given referenceFieldValue in the specified table, by adding the specified files to
            the file field with the name fieldName.

delete.summary:
Deletes the specified file from the file field with the name fieldName on the record with the given
            referenceFieldValue in the specified table.

get.summary: Downloads the file with the name fileName.
Gets the tables in the Project.

200.description: The collection of tables in the project.

post.summary: Adds a user to the project.

requestBody.description: The user email that should be added to the project and the group they should be put in.

204.description: The user was successfully added to the project and group.

put.summary: Changes which group a user is in.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: The Id of the user to be edited.

requestBody.description: An object containing the group that the user is to be moved to.

204.description: The user was successfully moved to the group.

delete.summary: Removes a user from the project.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: The Id of the user to be removed.

204.description: The user was successfully removed from the project.

messages.description: Gets or sets the error messages.

ApiErrorResponse.description: Contains messages to return from the Api.

referenceFieldValue.description: Gets or sets the id of the created resource.

ResourceCreatedValue.description: Represents the value of a new resource.

Gridfox API Key.description: The Gridfox API Key to be used for the Public API Integration. Example: "gridfox-api-key: {prefix.key}"
Gridfox API Key.name: gridfox-api-key
